title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Aghh haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: These changes

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WHATA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I can't get out !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I can't escape!! Let me outta here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UiiiiiH uih uih uih uih... that's one down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world did you do?! Give Carrot back to us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Nami, don't go near her!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you fret... I don't plan on killing you... Besides, haven't you all realized it by now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: NOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Carrot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Mama" is well aware that you're all transpassing on her territory!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Were you under the impression that you had infiltrated the island?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, sorry to burst your bubble, but the only reason I'm here...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Is because Mama ordered it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: that one over there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: These ones over here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Anyone seems

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: All of those guys over there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And even that one over there... We've all recieved the same orders from her.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Let the straw hats wander and roam aimlessly for a bit..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "But under no circumstances are you to let them meet up with Sanji."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "When you finally confront them, make sure they fully understand the consequences- ces of going against my wishes."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: UITH UITH UITH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Someone I'll be

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now then, "homes"!!! Make sure you don't lose sight of those two!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Are we allowed to move now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ack!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Chopper !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Nami, run!! We're outnumbered right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy has zero chance of making it out safely if all three of us get caught!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have to find him and tell him what's going on!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll hold them off and buy you as much time as I can!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: "Rumble" !!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're up against the crew of one of the "four emperors"... and it's just dawned on me now... that we've under- estimated them... Greatly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Booooo Othtt that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Eee- eek!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...Okay!! I'll be back shortly with reinforce-ments!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Uih uih ...this is amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had you pegged as an interesting one from the get go,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But to think that this would be the extent of your abili- ties...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA is going to be ecstatic!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She was never going to be content with just "all the races of the world"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So she's been collecting all manner of beasts on the side as well! Uh uh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: PANT... PANT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Come out, come out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Wherever you are~ Little girl!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...and so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since then, I've been run- ning through these woods like a chicken with its' head cut off...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stumbling through the dark trying to find you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's crazy! I'm glad we found each other!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, we should hurry up and go save chopper and carrot!! Where are they?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The story I just told you... took place right here!! But, as you can see, there isn't a single trace of anyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Right here!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
